name: Fractional Knapsack
description: Given weights and values of n items, put these items in a knapsack of capacity W to get the maximum total value in the knapsack. You can break items — i.e., take fractions of items. Sort by value/weight ratio and greedily pick items.

examples.output: 240.0 (take items 0 and 1 fully: 60+100=160, then 2/3 of item 2: 80 → total 240)
